etymology.description: 日(日) (rì, "sun") + 堇 (jǐn, phonetic element linked to heat and fire)
etymology.interpretation: The character 暵 (xiàn, "dry") combines the semantic component 日(日) (rì, "sun"), representing heat from the sun, with the phonetic component 堇 (jǐn), which suggests burning or heat. The combination evokes the sense of intense heat and dryness, as one might experience under a scorching sun.
